message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title US004 - As Administrator, I want to search for users

actor Administrator

participant ":SearchUsersByParamsRoute" as Route
participant "inDto : SearchUserDto" as InDto
participant ":UsersController" as Controller
participant ":SearchUsersByParamsService" as Service
participant ":ISystemUserRepo" as SysRepo
participant ":IUserProfileRepo" as ProfileRepo
participant "usersFound : List<SystemUser>" as UsersFound
participant "usersFoundDto : List<UserDto>" as UsersFoundDto
participant "user : SystemUser" as User
participant ":SystemUserMapper" as Mapper
participant "userDto : OutputUserDto" as UserDto
participant "usersJson : ResponseEntity" as UsersJson

Administrator -> Route : 1 GET /users?name={name}&email={email}&profile={profile}&func={func}
note over Administrator,Route
The parameters (name, email, profile and function) will be in the query of the request.
At least, one of tham must be typed or chosen.
end note

Route -> InDto : 2 searchUsersByTypedParams(inDto)
InDto -> Controller : 3 searchUsersByTypedParams(inDto)

opt if the request has a profile
Controller -> ProfileRepo : 4 result : existsByUserProfileId(profile)
end opt

alt depending on which params came from inputDto, the service class will invoke the respective method
Controller -> Service : 5 findAllBy...()
Service -> SysRepo : 6 create()
SysRepo --> UsersFound : usersFound : List<SystemUser>
Service --> Controller : 7 usersFound
Controller -> UsersFoundDto : 8 create()
Controller --> UsersFoundDto : usersFoundDto : List<UserDto>
end alt

loop for each user found at the list
Controller -> Mapper : 9 model2Dto(user)
Mapper -> UserDto : 10 create()
Mapper --> Controller : 11 userDto
Controller -> UsersFoundDto : 12 add(userDto)
end loop

Controller --> InDto : 13 usersFoundDto
InDto -> UsersJson : 14 create(usersFoundDto)
UsersJson --> Route : 15 usersJson

Route --> Administrator : 16 Show the list of user found by typed/chosen parameters

@enduml
```
